subject: UI/UX Design Intelligence
research_areas: Information architecture: card sorting, tree testing, content hierarchy, mental models
Navigation taxonomy: flat vs deep, faceted, hub-and-spoke, linear
Onboarding flow patterns: PLG, checklist, tooltip tours, progressive, empty-state-driven
Wizard/stepper patterns: multi-step forms, progress indication, branching logic
Search as navigation: command palettes (Cmd+K), global search, contextual search
Breadcrumb, Tab, Sidebar, Bottom navigation patterns
Progressive disclosure: accordions, expandable sections, show more
Dashboard design: information hierarchy, widget layout, personalization
Settings architecture: flat vs grouped, search in settings
Error flows: 404, permission denied, network errors, session expiry — recovery paths
Zero-data states: first-run experience, feature discovery, guided setup
Notification architecture: in-app vs push, inbox pattern, badge counts
Deep linking: state preservation, shareable URLs, back button behavior
gaps: Limited empirical data on faceted navigation effectiveness in SaaS vs ecommerce
No quantitative studies on settings page search adoption rates
Deep linking patterns for SPAs with complex state machines need more coverage
Notification fatigue thresholds and optimal frequency data is sparse
